mapper.select: select course_id, teacher_name, summary, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from course_details where course_id = #{courseId} and deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into course_details (course_id, teacher_name, summary, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted) values (#{courseId}, #{teacherName}, #{summary}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update course_details set teacher_name = #{teacherName}, summary = #{summary}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where course_id = #{courseId} and deleted = false
